ECrel.None: {entry1} and {entry2} have no direct enzyme-enzyme (ECrel) relationship.
ECrel.compound: {compound} is shared in successive reactions of {entry1} and {entry2}.
ECrel.compound, activation, indirect effect: {entry1} activates {entry2} via {compound}, and exerts an indirect activating effect.

GErel.expression, indirect effect: {entry1} has an indirect effect on the expression of {entry2}.
GErel.repression, indirect effect: {entry1} represses {entry2} and exerts an indirect effect.

PCrel.None: The link between {entry1} and {entry2} is unknown.
PCrel.activation, dephosphorylation: {entry1} regulates the level of {entry2} by removing phosphate groups.
PCrel.binding/association, indirect effect: {entry1} binds to {entry2} and indirectly affects this pathway.
PCrel.compound, activation, indirect effect: {entry1} activates {entry2} via {compound} and has an indirect effect.
PCrel.state change: There is a state change from {entry1} to {entry2}.

PPrel.activation, binding/association: {entry1} binds or associates with {entry2} and activates it.
PPrel.activation, indirect effect: {entry1} activates {entry2} and exerts an indirect effect.
PPrel.activation, phosphorylation, binding/ass: {entry1} activates, phosphorylates, and binds or associates with {entry2}.
PPrel.activation, phosphorylation, indirect ef: {entry1} activates {entry2} via phosphorylation, and exerts an indirect effect.
PPrel.binding/association, indirect effect: {entry1} binds or associates with {entry2}, exerting an indirect effect.
PPrel.compound: {entry1} can affect the activity of  {entry2} via {compound}.
PPrel.compound, activation: {entry1} produces {compound} which then affects {entry2} contributing to the activation of downstream responses.
PPrel.compound, activation, indirect effect: {entry1} activates {entry2} via {compound} and exerts an indirect effect.
PPrel.indirect effect: {entry1} has an indirect link with {entry2} and exerts an indirect effect.
PPrel.indirect effect, phosphorylation: {entry1} causes phosphorylation of {entry2} and has an indirect effect.
PPrel.inhibition, binding/association: {entry1} binds to and inhibits the activity of {entry2}.
PPrel.inhibition, dephosphorylation, indirect: {entry1} inhibits {entry2} through dephosphorylation, and exerts an indirect effect in this pathway.
PPrel.inhibition, indirect effect: {entry1} inhibits {entry2} and exerts an indirect effect in this pathway.
PPrel.inhibition, phosphorylation, indirect ef: {entry1} inhibits {entry2} by phosphorylation, and exerts an indirect effect in this pathway.
PPrel.phosphorylation, indirect effect: {entry1} phosphorylates {entry2} and exerts an indirect effect.
PPrel.state change: There is a state change between {entry1} and {entry2}.

maplink.None: The link between {entry1} and {entry2} are not yet reported.
maplink.compound: {compound} mediates a functional link between {entry1} and {entry2} at the pathway level.
